name: Aztech Global Ltd.
summary: Aztech Global Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, engineering, and manufacturing of IoT devices, data-communication products, and LED lighting products. It operates through IoT Devices and Data-communication Products; LED lighting products; and Others segments. The company provides smart security cameras; IoT lighting products; homeplugs; fibre gateways; dual band Wi-Fi MESH controllers; satellite modems; climate control mattresses; tracking devices; and healthtech products, such as wearable sensors to original equipment manufacturers (OEM) and original design manufacturers (ODM).It also distributes IoT home automation systems that enable users to control devices at home wirelessly through an application on their smartphones or tablets under the Kyla brand names through channel partners and e-commerce platforms. In addition, the company provides LED lighting products, such as luminaires, bulbs, and tubes for use in residential, commercial, industrial, agriculture, refrigeration, and automotive industrial applications; electrical and LED lights, fittings, and parts; plastic injection parts; and multi-communication products and computer peripherals, as well as installs lighting systems. Further, it offers kitchen appliances, including ovens, air fryers, electric kettles, and toasters; and home and living products, such as cordless vacuum cleaners, fans, and air purifiers. The company also provides joint development manufacturing and contract manufacturing services to multinational corporations. The company was formerly known as Aztech Global Pte. Ltd. and changed its name to Aztech Global Ltd. in February 2021. Aztech Global Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is based in Singapore. Aztech Global Ltd. is a subsidiary of Aztech Group Ltd.
